Video.summary: The 2023 English Open Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final brings serious heat as Ryler DeHeart and Megan Fudge square off against Nick Petterson and Susannah Barr. This final showcases elite shot-making, smart stacking strategies, and seamless teamwork from both sides of the net.With momentum shifting and nerves running high, every rally counts. From laser-focused drives to perfectly timed poaches, this match is a clinic in competitive mixed doubles and a thrilling conclusion to the Open division.
Video.title: English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr

Image.alt: English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr
English Open 2023 – Mixed Doubles Open 5.0+ Final – DeHeart & Fudge vs Petterson & Barr

Video.summary: It's the final day of group stage matches on Super Sunday in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as game Number Six features Pune United battling the Hyderabad Superstars.This is an important game for both teams as they fight for the last remaining spots in the semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

Video.summary: In this Men’s Doubles Open Group C clash, Tom Turney and Sam Chajul take on Jamie Basford and Peter Hitchman. Watch as smart defense, aggressive drives, and well-timed net play define this intense showdown at the 2023 English Nationals. A standout match that reflects the growing depth of talent in British pickleball.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman
English Nationals 2023 – Men’s Doubles Group C – Turney & Chajul vs Basford & Hitchman

Video.summary: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Video.summary: It's a "Terrific Tuesday" at the World Pickleball League (WPL) as Day 5 features a critical matchup between the Bengaluru Jawans and the Delhi Dilwale. The stakes are high: Delhi, currently number five on the points table, has a chance to move to number three if the results go their way, while Bengaluru looks to bounce back from a recent loss.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Delhi - Day 5 Tie 1

Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2

WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2

Video.summary: Catch the collegiate pickleball excitement from Week 2, Day 2 of the NCPA Utah Regional 2025. This intense team match features Utah Tech taking on Utah State as they compete for a national bid to the National Championship in St. Louis, Missouri.The episode features commentary on the exploding growth of college pickleball with college legend and Yola's College Relationship Manager, Timber Tucker. Watch key matchups in men's doubles, women's singles, and the deciding mixed doubles games. Key players include Gavin Fowler (singles 5.2 rating) , Brinley Horton , and Bo Cavell from Utah Tech, as well as standout players Olivia and Brady.
Video.title: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Image.alt: NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State
NCPA Utah Regional 2025 - Team Match 2 - Utah Tech vs. Utah State

Video.summary: Two of the sport’s biggest names meet in this Women’s Pro Singles pre-medal match at the 2023 US Open. Parris Todd and Simone Jardim bring elite-level strategy, precision, and intensity to the court in a pivotal semifinal showdown. Who will rise to the challenge and advance?
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Singles Semifinal – Todd vs Jardim

Video.summary: Commentators provide an inside look at Game 2 of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida. The Fort Myers Flamingos get off to a dominant start, but the Jacksonville Ballers refuse to give up, staging a dramatic late-game comeback that tightens the score and mounts the pressure. This episode features key players like Stevie, Sophia Dorsey, and Maddalena, with highlights of their strategic plays and powerful shots. Tune in to see if the Flamingos can hold on to their lead and close out the game against the surging Ballers.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 2 - Jacksonville Ballers vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: Witness one of the most exciting finals from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome. In the Women's Senior Singles Open Final, Team England’s Anna Linton takes on Team Italy’s Paola Tampieri at the iconic Stadio dei Marmi. Linton starts with commanding form, dominating the first game with powerful forehand drives. However, the momentum shifts as Tampieri, fueled by a passionate home crowd, adjusts her strategy to target Linton’s backhand and level the match.
Video.title: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri

Image.alt: Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
Women's Senior Singles Final - Linton vs. Tampieri
